pages.text:
BUREAU OF INTERNATIONAL EXPOSITION

INSTRUMENT OF ACCESSION

WHEREAS the Convention relating to International Exhibitions was done at Paris on 22 November 1928:

HEREAS the Convention was amended and supplemented by t rotocol of 30 November 1972, the Amendments of 24 June 1982 and 31 M 1988;

AND WHEREAS Article 3 of the said Protocol provides that the Protoc hall remain open for accession by Governments Parties to the 1928 Conventio after 29 November 1973;

NOW THEREFORE, the Government of the Republic of Ghana, hereby accedes to the 1928 Convention

and the 1972

Protocol, including the

Amendment of 24 June 1982 and 31 May 1988, and undertakes faithfully to fulfil and carry out all the provisions therein contained.

IN WITNESS WHEREOF, | AKWASI OSEI-ADJEI, Minister for Foreig

Iffairs of the Republic of Ghana, have signed this instrument of Accession an caused the Seal of the Minister of Foreign Affairs of the Republic of Ghana to be hereunto affixed.

Done at Accra on the ninth day of November in the year two thousand and seven (2007).

Dinali

AKWASI OSEI-ADJEI, MI

MINISTER FOR FOREIGN AFFAIRS
